hero.title: FitZone Studio
hero.subtitle: Yoga, HIIT, personal training and group classes — find your strength in our modern studio in the Schanzenviertel.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: More than a gym — a community
about.heading: Your path to more strength and balance
about.text1: Since 2018, FitZone Studio has been the go-to place for holistic fitness in Hamburg. Founded by Lisa Bergmann, certified yoga teacher and personal trainer with over 15 years of experience.
about.text2: Our approach combines functional training with mindfulness. Small groups, personal attention, and a strong community spirit make the difference. You never train alone here.

services.title: Our Classes
services.subtitle: From dynamic HIIT to relaxing yoga — the right fit for every level

items.title: Yoga & Pilates
items.description: Find your inner balance with Vinyasa, Hatha, and Power Yoga in a calm atmosphere.

items.title: HIIT & Cardio
items.description: High-intensity interval training for maximum fat burn and endurance.

items.title: Personal Training
items.description: Individual 1:1 training with certified coaches for your personal goals.

items.title: Group Classes
items.description: Motivating group workouts in small classes for maximum personal attention.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: A look inside our studio and community

items.name: Julia Schneider
items.text: The yoga classes at FitZone have changed my life. The atmosphere is so welcoming and the trainers are incredibly attentive. Finally a studio that feels like home.

items.name: Markus Brandt
items.text: After 6 months of HIIT at FitZone, I lost 15 kg and feel fitter than ever. The small group sizes make the difference — you truly feel seen.

items.name: Elif Yilmaz
items.text: The personal training is worth every penny. My coach created a plan that fits perfectly into my daily routine. The results speak for themselves!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about FitZone

items.question: Do I need prior experience for the classes?
items.answer: No! All our classes are suitable for beginners to advanced. Our trainers always offer variations so everyone can train at their level.

items.question: Is there a trial class?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a free trial in every class. Simply book through the contact form or by phone.

items.question: What membership options are available?
items.answer: We offer flexible monthly, quarterly, and annual memberships. All memberships include access to all group classes. Personal training can be booked separately.

items.question: What should I bring to training?
items.answer: Comfortable sportswear, a towel, and a water bottle. Yoga mats, weights, and all other equipment are provided free of charge.

items.question: Are there showers and changing rooms?
items.answer: Yes, we have spacious changing rooms with showers, lockers, and hair dryers. Towels can be rented for a small fee.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.generalText: The protection of your personal data is of particular concern to us. We process your data exclusively on the basis of legal provisions (GDPR).
datenschutz.hostingText: Our website is hosted by Vercel Inc. When you visit, log data is automatically collected and deleted after 30 days.
datenschutz.cookiesText: Our website uses technically necessary cookies required for the operation of the site.
datenschutz.contactFormText: Your details from the contact form are stored for processing your inquiry. Processing is done through Web3Forms.
datenschutz.rightsText: You have the rights to information, correction, deletion, restriction, data portability, and objection.
datenschutz.changesText: We reserve the right to adapt this privacy policy to ensure it always complies with current legal requirements.
